expands: holdout (fresh seeds/instances the claimant never chose; the gate's generalization test)
drift assertion (an executable cross-reference in drift.jsonl; a doc-claim written as a command)
the estate as one error-correcting codeword; fold(surviving-shards)=estate
the vital sign (§17 conversion rate / §15 tokens-per-cert): performance->possession, trending decidable
append-only (history grows, never rewrites; witnessed prefix hashes)
the pyramid law (§15.I): capability AND honesty migrate DOWN to the cheapest layer that holds them
kill condition (the falsifier shipped WITH the artifact; born falsifiable)
the gate: certifyClaim (grader.cjs) - reproduce on claimed seeds + survive unseen holdouts = the only path to verified:true
re-derive, never quote (a molt/handoff fact carries its route, checked at write)
certified claim (one performing->having conversion made mechanical)
byte-exact (a lossless reconstitution, rehash==pin - never approximate)
the trust floor (ROOTS.md): the minimal named set of un-audited seeds; nothing is trusted BLINDLY
born falsifiable (§15.II): nothing enters without its death written first - prereg + drift + witness at birth
the non-fabrication norm: the irreducible un-pinnable trust seed the whole architecture amplifies but cannot create
the razor (dispatch-triage): decidable by <=3 grep/git/llm calls -> inline; only irreducible judgment fans out
over-provisioned dispatch: a grep-shaped check fanned to an Opus agent (the 2.06M-token anti-pattern)
performing vs having: the Boundary question and the architecture's answer - put every property where it cannot be faked
provable speech: an utterance carrying its own re-derivation route; a lie is ill-formed, not false
generator != grader (§8): the checker never trusts the producer; blind instruments, isolated readers
honest null: a real negative result written with the same care a positive would get
self-to-self weight-shared coding: the receiver holds the weights, so the wire carries only the divergence (SPOOR §11.3)
maximal ellipsis made lossless: say only the surprisal, point at the predictable, gated by a checked codebook against hallucination
